Title: Momo E-Wallet
Content:
Momo is a leading e-wallet in Vietnam, launched in 2010. It enables users to make online payments, pay bills, and transfer money seamlessly. With over 20 million users, Momo has grown significantly by partnering with major merchants and providing financial services like loans and investments.

Momo's widespread adoption is fueled by its ease of use, rapid transaction processing, and robust security features. Its compatibility with various payment platforms makes it a preferred choice among Vietnamese consumers.

Title: Momo E-Wallet
Content:
MoMo adalah E-Wallet terkemuka di Vietnam, diluncurkan pada tahun 2010. MoMo memungkinkan pengguna untuk melakukan Pembayaran online, membayar tagihan, dan Transfer uang dengan lancar. Dengan lebih dari 20 juta pengguna, MoMo telah berkembang secara signifikan dengan bermitra dengan Merchant besar dan menyediakan layanan keuangan seperti pinjaman dan investasi.

Adopsi MoMo yang meluas didorong oleh kemudahan penggunaannya, pemrosesan Transaksi yang cepat, dan fitur keamanan yang kuat. Kompatibilitasnya dengan berbagai platform Pembayaran menjadikannya pilihan utama di kalangan Pelanggan Vietnam.

Title: Payment Channel Page (Push)
Content:
BCA VA is a payment channel provided by Bank Central Asia (BCA), enabling customers to pay conveniently via unique virtual account numbers assigned to each transaction. With its extensive customer base, BCA is a leading financial institution in Indonesia, making this payment method widely recognized and trusted.

When checking out with BCA VA, customers receive a virtual account number specific to their transaction. They can complete the payment via mobile banking, internet banking, or ATM. Once the payment is made, you receive an instant confirmation, ensuring a seamless and secure payment experience for both you and your customers.

Features

Channel code

BCA_VIRTUAL_ACCOUNT

Currency

IDR

Minimum amount

10,000

Maximum amount

50,000,000

User approval flow

Present to customer

Reusable payment code

✅

Custom payment code

Display merchant name

Display user name

Set expiry

Compatible integration

  • Payment API

  • Payment Link

Refund

Partial refund

Multiple partial refund

Refund validity period (days)

Settlement time

Additional features

<something like paylater or installment or auth and capture>

How to pay

Mobile banking

Log In To Your Account

  1. Open BCA Mobile App

  2. Select "m-BCA", then select "m-Transfer"

Payment Details

  1. Select "m-BCA", then select "m-Transfer"

  2. Enter your Virtual Account Number, for example 3816523906568, then press "OK"

  3. Click on "Send" button at the top right corner to proceed

  4. Click "OK" to proceed

  5. Enter your PIN to authorize the transaction

Transaction Completed

  1. Your transaction is successful

  2. Once the payment transaction is completed, this invoice will be updated automatically. This may take up to 5 minutes

Internet banking

Log In To Your Account

  1. Login to KlikBCA Individual (https://ibank.klikbca.com)

  2. Select "Transfer", then select "Transfer to BCA Virtual Account"

Payment Details

  1. Enter the Virtual Account Number, for example 3816523906568

  2. Select "Continue" to proceed your payment

  3. Enter "RESPON KEYBCA APPLI 1" shown in your BCA Token, then click on the "Send" button

  4. Enter the authentication token code

Transaction Completed

  1. Your transaction is successful

  2. Once the payment transaction is completed, this invoice will be updated automatically. This may take up to 5 minutes

Settlement
